title: [Palette Perfections]
description: Chemicals linger in the air, the sharp tang of crushed pigments mingling with the sweetness of drying oils.  Large windows with keyhole arches filter light through leaded stained glass, casting shifting hues across an alabaster counter marred with spills of ochre, indigo, and madder root.  A half-finished mural blooms across stucco walls, swirling between rough sketches and vibrant detail.  Beakers and ceramic bowls clutter a side table, their contents shimmering in pools of liquid sapphire, burnt sienna, and deep viridian.
